title: Topos Theory & Foundational Logic Shadow Analysis

homotopy_sheaves.description: π_n(F) for sheaf F on ∞-topos: homotopy group sheaves
homotopy_sheaves.why: π_n = homotopy groups: exp(2πi·) structure for n≥1 = EML-3

classifying_topos.why: BG = K(G,1) = Eilenberg-MacLane space: complex phases in fundamental group = EML-3

type_1.description: Type₁ = universe of sets (h-sets): first non-trivial level
type_1.why: Sets = groupoids = exp(i·) structure (discrete topology with phases) = EML-3

path_space.description: Id_A(a,b): path space = fundamental groupoid structure
path_space.why: Path = parallel transport with phase: exp(i∮A) structure = EML-3

equivalence_type.description: A≃B = type of equivalences: (f: A→B) × isEquiv(f)
equivalence_type.why: isEquiv = contractible fiber = homotopy structure = EML-3 (path spaces)

circle_type.description: S¹ = type: base × loop, loop: base=base (in HoTT)
circle_type.why: S¹ has non-trivial fundamental group ℤ: exp(iθ) winding = EML-3

loop_spaces.description: Ω^n X = Map((S^n, *), (X, *)): n-fold loop space
loop_spaces.why: S^n = n-sphere: exp(i·) fundamental group; loop space = EML-3

suspension.why: Suspension creates new homotopy groups with complex phases = EML-3

elementary_topos.note: Elementary topos is EML-3 (sheaves = EML-3 structure)

grothendieck.object: Grothendieck site and topos of sheaves Sh(C,J)

etale_cohomology.why: L-functions of varieties = EML-3 shadow of étale cohomology

shape_modality.why: ʃX = path space completion: exp(i·) homotopy = EML-3

flat_modality.why: ♭ = local systems: flat connection = exp(i∮A) holonomy = EML-3

topos_shadow.dominant_pattern: All foundational EML-∞ objects shadow at EML-3; exception: codiscrete modality (EML-2)

key_theorem: The Foundational Shadow Theorem (S264): All foundational EML-∞ objects (∞-toposes, HoTT universes, univalence, Ω-spectra) have shadow depth EML-3. Reason: all these structures are built on HOMOTOPY — path spaces, loop spaces, fundamental groups — which carry exp(i·) phases (complex oscillation = EML-3). The Ω tower: each delooping adds a loop space with S¹ = exp(iθ) structure = EML-3. HoTT universes: Type₁ has sets = discrete groupoids; path spaces have phase structure. EXCEPTION: the ♯ (codiscrete/sharp) modality in cohesive HoTT shadows at EML-2 because ♯ collapses homotopy (no phases remain) → measurement-type = EML-2. This exception CONFIRMS the rule: when complex phases are removed (♯), shadow drops to EML-2. COROLLARY: the shadow depth of foundational structures is EML-3 iff homotopy is non-trivial. The only EML-2 foundational shadow arises when homotopy is collapsed.
rabbit_hole_log: All ∞-topos/HoTT/Ω-spectrum objects shadow at EML-3: universal homotopy = exp(i·) phases
Sharp modality ♯: collapses homotopy → no phases → shadow=EML-2 (exception confirms rule)
Shadow=3 iff homotopy non-trivial (has loop spaces with exp(iθ) structure)
Étale cohomology: shadows via L-functions = EML-3 (oscillatory Dirichlet series)
Ω-tower: no matter how deep, each delooping shadows at EML-3 (stability confirmed)
